about.title: About WAZA
about.description: WAZA creates practical, functional AI tools and custom development for businesses. AI-native products, custom development, consulting, and training. Based in Mexico (CDMX & SLP).

openclaw.title: OpenClaw Skill
openclaw.description: Install the WAZA skill in your OpenClaw agent with a single command. Your agent will get instant access to our services, projects, pricing, and contact info.

cta.title: Integration & API
cta.description: Want to integrate WAZA data into your agent or application? Contact us at info@wazalab.mx for API access and partnerships.
